text: enabled me to quit smoking, I think it works well, and even better combined with zyban/bupropion no side effects Choose a future date to quit smoking. (I picked a date 3 months in advance)Start taking the pills a couple weeks before the quit date. I actually started smoking less without trying. Chantix interfers with the pleasure receptors in your brain, so smoking is not very satisfying. I have now been smoke free for 1 month.
